mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_conversation (title, user_id, model, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{userId}, #{model}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_conversation SET title = #{title}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE ai_conversation SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, user_id as userId, model, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_conversation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT id, title, user_id as userId, model, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_conversation WHERE id = #{param1} AND user_id = #{param2} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_message (conversation_id, role, content, tokens, create_time) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{tokens}, NOW())
